_docs: Edit this file to change which AI models power your web research.
_models_help: Format: 'provider:model-name'. Use 'openrouter:' prefix for OpenRouter models.
_openrouter_models: Browse free models at https://openrouter.ai/models (filter by 'Free')
_tavily_help: Get a free key at tavily.com (1,000 searches/month free). Leave as PLACEHOLDER to use DuckDuckGo instead.
